name: Lobster Monte Carlo- Mother's Day Special
recipeInstructions:
1. In one pan, make the lemon butter sauce by melting butter and adding lemon juice.
2. In another pan, sauté carrot, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, and risotto until cooked.
3. After steaming the lobster for 5 minutes, cut it in half and grill until cooked.
4. Sauté asparagus, shallots, and portobello mushrooms with shrimp and lobster in olive oil, adding salt and pepper to taste.
5. To serve, place rice on a plate, then layer with seafood mixture and lemon butter sauce.
